name: The Opportunist

sheet.name: The Opportunist
sheet.background_story:
During the Battle of the church, "The Opportunist" was last seen on a hill, selling rocks purportedly related to the one that caused Detriti's demise.

As the final battle approaches, The Opportunist, true to form, positions himself where business thrives, even amidst the climactic clash. He is certain that even in these dire times, there are profits to be seized.

After meeting with his master "the Black Scryer" he decided to sear an item to be prepare for the battle ahead.

Died at the Coven's Lair
